title: Activator Rail Crafting Output 16
description: Craft 16 instead of 6 Activator Rails. Detector and Powered Rail are available too as seperated projects.
body:
A small part to enhance the Minecart-system.

Matching the Rail recipe output of 16 to Activator, Detector and Powered Rail. 

**Detector Rail** version can be found here: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/detector-rail-crafting-output-16](https://modrinth.com/datapack/detector-rail-crafting-output-16)

**Powered Rail** version can be found here: [https://modrinth.com/datapack/powered-rail-crafting-output-16](https://modrinth.com/datapack/powered-rail-crafting-output-16)
